content.markdownBody:
## 📄 Arxiv 前沿论文

> **爬取时间**：2026-05-29 07:59:01 UTC

本表数据来自 Arxiv 检索，关键词组为「(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl|reinforcement learning)」，时间窗口 2026-03-12 ~ 2026-03-18。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 学科类别 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|----------|
| 9 | Agentic AI for SAGIN Resource Management: Semantic Awareness, Orchestration, and Optimization | 提出面向空天地一体化网络的 Agentic AI 资源管理框架，融合语义感知与强化学习优化 | http://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16458v1 | SAGIN,资源管理,Agentic AI,强化学习,6G | 2026-03-17 | cs.NI |
| 8 | AgroNVILA: Perception-Reasoning Decoupling for Multi-view Agricultural Multimodal Large Language Models | 提出农业多视角多模态大模型的感知-推理解耦方法，涵盖 UAV 航拍与卫星影像 | http://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14342v1 | 农业,多模态,MLLM,UAV,视觉推理 | 2026-03-15 | cs.CV |

本表数据来自 Semantic Scholar 检索，关键词组为「(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)」，时间窗口 2026-03-12 ~ 2026-03-18。

本周该关键词组合在 Semantic Scholar 无新增收录结果。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 来源/venue | 引用数 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|------------|--------|
| - | (无) | - | - | - | - | - | - |

## 📚 OpenAlex

本表数据来自 OpenAlex 检索，关键词组为「(uav|aerial) & (vlm|llm|mllm) & (rl)」，时间窗口 2026-03-12 ~ 2026-03-18。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | 发表时间 | 来源/venue | 引用数 |
|------|------|------|------|------|----------|------------|--------|
| 9 | Agentic AI for SAGIN Resource Management: Semantic Awareness, Orchestration, and Optimization | 同 Arxiv 条目，面向 6G SAGIN 的 Agentic AI 资源管理 | https://openalex.org/W7139148248 | SAGIN,资源管理,Agentic AI,强化学习,6G | 2026-03-17 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 9 | Agentic AI for SAGIN Resource Management: Semantic Awareness, Orchestration, and Optimization | 同上，arXiv 镜像 | https://doi.org/10.48550/arxiv.2603.16458 | SAGIN,资源管理,Agentic AI,强化学习,6G | 2026-03-17 | arXiv (Cornell University) | 0 |
| 8 | AgroNVILA: Perception-Reasoning Decoupling for Multi-view Agricultural Multimodal Large Language Models | 同 Arxiv 条目，农业多视角 MLLM | https://openalex.org/W7139146731 | 农业,多模态,MLLM,UAV,视觉推理 | 2026-03-15 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 7 | Adversarial Generation and Collaborative Evolution of Safety-Critical Scenarios for Autonomous Vehicles | AAAI 2026，针对自动驾驶的对抗场景生成 | https://doi.org/10.1609/aaai.v40i45.41238 | 自动驾驶,对抗生成,场景仿真,AV | 2026-03-14 | Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence | 1 |
| 7 | Towards Agentic Urban Digital Twins (AUDiTs): advancing new urban science through Human-AI co-learning agents | 城市数字孪生与 Agentic AI 结合 | https://doi.org/10.1007/s44212-025-00099-3 | 城市数字孪生,Agentic AI,Human-AI协作,智慧城市 | 2026-03-17 | Urban Informatics | 1 |
| 6 | LINA's testing infrastructure enables AI to take-off in unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) | UAV 自动驾驶 AI 测试基础设施 | https://doi.org/10.3389/frobt.2026.1764248 | UAV,自动驾驶,AI测试,机器人 | 2026-03-13 | Frontiers in Robotics and AI | 0 |
| 6 | Chain-of-Search: Parameter-Efficient Reasoning for Zero-Shot Object Navigation | AAAI 2026，零样本物体导航的参数高效推理 | https://doi.org/10.1609/aaai.v40i3.37150 | 零样本导航,推理,具身智能,AAAI | 2026-03-14 | Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence | 0 |
| 6 | D3PG-Light: A Lightweight and Stable Resource Scheduling Framework for UAV-Integrated Sensing, Communication, and Computation Systems | 轻量级 UAV 资源调度框架 D3PG-Light | https://doi.org/10.3390/s26061829 | UAV,资源调度,ISCC,轻量级 | 2026-03-13 | Sensors | 0 |
| 5 | High-Fidelity Wireless Signal Reconstruction by Small Language Models with Reinforcement Learning in Low Altitude Wireless Network | 小语言模型结合 RL 的低空无线信号重建 | https://doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-9029307/v1 | SLM,无线信号,RL,低空网络 | 2026-03-12 | Research Square | 0 |
| 5 | From Digital Twins to World Models: Opportunities, Challenges, and Applications for Mobile Edge General Intelligence | 数字孪生向世界模型的演进 | https://openalex.org/W7139146900 | 数字孪生,世界模型,边缘智能,6G | 2026-03-18 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 5 | Video Understanding: From Geometry and Semantics to Unified Models | 视频理解统一模型综述 | https://doi.org/10.1007/s11633-026-1656-7 | 视频理解,统一模型,几何,语义 | 2026-03-18 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 4 | Autonomous Vehicle Path Planning by Searching with Differentiable Simulation | AAAI 2026，可微仿真的自动驾驶路径规划 | https://doi.org/10.1609/aaai.v40i22.38917 | 自动驾驶,路径规划,可微仿真,AAAI | 2026-03-14 | Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence | 0 |
| 4 | RSEdit: Text-Guided Image Editing for Remote Sensing | 遥感图像的文本引导编辑 | https://openalex.org/W7139145471 | 遥感,图像编辑,生成模型 | 2026-03-14 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 4 | Artificial Intelligence-Driven Integration of Terrestrial and Non-Terrestrial Networks: A Perspective | AI 驱动的天地一体化网络融合展望 | https://doi.org/10.31181/jidmgc21202634 | 天地一体化,6G,AI融合 | 2026-03-15 | Journal of Intelligent Decision Making and Granular Computing | 0 |
| 3 | Embodied Foundation Models at the Edge: A Survey of Deployment Constraints and Mitigation Strategies | 边缘部署具身基础模型的综述 | https://doi.org/10.20944/preprints202603.1293.v1 | 具身AI,边缘部署,基础模型,综述 | 2026-03-17 | Preprints.org | 0 |
| 3 | Embodied Foundation Models at the Edge: A Survey of Deployment Constraints and Mitigation Strategies | 同上，arXiv 版本 | https://openalex.org/W7140001054 | 具身AI,边缘部署,基础模型,综述 | 2026-03-16 | ArXiv.org | 0 |
| 2 | Increasing intelligence in AI agents can worsen collective outcomes | AI 智能体集体行为研究 | https://openalex.org/W7135429436 | AI智能体,集体行为,博弈 | 2026-03-12 | ArXiv.org | 0 |

## 🔥 GitHub 周榜

本表数据来自 GitHub Trending 类 RSS 榜单的原始条目，**不做**关键词过滤或删减，反映当周全球开发者关注热点。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | Star | Fork | 主语言 |
|------|------|------|------|------|------|------|--------|
| 9 | Lum1104/Understand-Anything | 将任意代码转换为可交互的知识图谱，支持 Claude Code、Cursor 等主流 AI 编码工具 | https://github.com/Lum1104/Understand-Anything | 知识图谱,代码理解,AI编程,开发工具 | - | - | - |
| 9 | colbymchenry/codegraph | 为 Claude Code 等提供预索引代码知识图谱，本地运行，降低 token 消耗 | https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph | 代码图谱,语义索引,本地AI,开发效率 | - | - | - |
| 8 | rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch | AI 工程从零学习课程，84% 学生使用 AI 工具但仅 18% 感到能专业使用 | https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch | AI工程,教程,课程,LLM | - | - | - |
| 8 | harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo | 利用 AI 大模型一键生成高清短视频，支持多语言文案、语音合成 | https://github.com/harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo | 视频生成,AI,短视频,AIGC | - | - | - |
| 8 | presenton/presenton | 开源 AI 演示文稿生成器与 API，Gamma、Beautiful AI 的替代方案 | https://github.com/presenton/presenton | 演示文稿,AI生成,开源,PPT | - | - | - |
| 7 | anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins | Anthropic 为知识工作者提供的 Claude 插件集合 | https://github.com/anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins | Claude,插件,知识工作,Anthropic | - | - | - |
| 7 | ruvnet/RuView | 将普通 WiFi 信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测与存在检测 | https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView | WiFi感知,空间智能,生命体征,无接触感知 | - | - | - |
| 7 | mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills | 面向 AI 智能体的网络安全技能库，754 个结构化技能，映射 5 大框架 | https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills | 网络安全,AI智能体,MITRE,技能库 | - | - | - |
| 7 | microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit | AI 智能体治理工具包，策略执行、零信任身份、执行沙箱 | https://github.com/microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit | AI治理,Agent,安全,微软 | - | - | - |
| 6 | hardikpandya/stop-slop | 去除 AI 写作风格的技能文件，消除 AI 写作的固定模式 | https://github.com/hardikpandya/stop-slop | AI写作,文本风格,技能文件 | - | - | - |
| 6 | HKUDS/ViMax | Agentic 视频生成工具，集成导演、编剧、制片与视频生成 | https://github.com/HKUDS/ViMax | 视频生成,Agentic,AI电影,多智能体 | - | - | - |
| 6 | anthropics/claude-plugins-official | Anthropic 官方 Claude Code 插件目录 | https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official | Claude,插件,官方,Anthropic | - | - | - |
| 6 | can1357/oh-my-pi | 终端 AI 编程代理，hash 锚定编辑，优化工具链 | https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi | AI编程,终端,Agent,IDE | - | - | - |
| 6 | dograh-hq/dograh | 开源语音 AI 平台，Vapi/Retell 的自托管替代方案 | https://github.com/dograh-hq/dograh | 语音AI,自托管,VAPI,工作流 | - | - | - |
| 5 | Leonxlnx/taste-skill | 给 AI 良好品味的技能框架，防止生成无聊的通用界面 | https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill | AI品味,UI,技能框架,前端 | - | - | - |
| 5 | Imbad0202/academic-research-skills | 面向 Claude Code 的学术研究技能套件 | https://github.com/Imbad0202/academic-research-skills | 学术研究,Claude,技能,研究 | - | - | - |
| 5 | cursor/plugins | Cursor 插件规范与官方插件 | https://github.com/cursor/plugins | Cursor,插件,IDE,官方 | - | - | - |
| 4 | rmyndharis/OpenWA | 开源自托管 WhatsApp API 网关 | https://github.com/rmyndharis/OpenWA | WhatsApp,API,开源,自托管 | - | - | - |
| 4 | p-e-w/heretic | 自动移除语言模型审查对齐的工具 | https://github.com/p-e-w/heretic | 模型对齐,审查移除,abliteration | - | - | - |
| 4 | BenedictKing/ccx | Claude/OpenAI/Gemini API 代理与协议转换网关 | https://github.com/BenedictKing/ccx | API代理,Claude,协议转换,网关 | - | - | - |
| 3 | Chachamaru127/claude-code-harness | Claude Code 专用开发 Harness，Plan→Work→Review 循环 | https://github.com/Chachamaru127/claude-code-harness | Claude,开发流程,Agent,质量 | - | - | - |

## 🔎 GitHub 指定日期检索

本表数据来自 GitHub 官方 `search/repositories` 在**全站公开仓库**范围内按关键词与时间条件（`pushed:`）筛出的结果，**不是** Trending 周榜/日榜榜单。关键词组为「uav & (rl|llm)」，时间窗口 2026-03-12 ~ 2026-03-18。

| 评分 | 标题 | 说明 | 链接 | 标签 | Star | Fork | 主语言 |
|------|------|------|------|------|------|------|--------|
| 9 | INAVFlights/inav-configurator | INAV 飞控配置器 | https://github.com/INAVFlights/inav-configurator | 飞控,无人机,配置工具 | 732 | 0 | JavaScript |
| 8 | xumeng367/DroneDetour | UAV 路径规划与自动绕障库，计算多边形禁飞区最短安全路径 | https://github.com/xumeng367/DroneDetour | UAV,路径规划,绕障,Android | 511 | 45 | Java |
| 7 | Robotics-STAR-Lab/SOAR | IROS'24 Oral，异构多 UAV 快速自主重建规划器 | https://github.com/Robotics-STAR-Lab/SOAR | 多UAV,异构,重建,规划 | 228 | 14 | C++ |
| 7 | WinstonJQ/FUEL-PX4-gazebo | PX4 + Gazebo 中的 UAV 探索仿真 | https://github.com/WinstonJQ/FUEL-PX4-gazebo | UAV,探索,PX4,Gazebo | 96 | 8 | C++ |
| 6 | Robotics-STAR-Lab/C2-Explorer | 灵活连续的去中心化多 UAV 探索框架 | https://github.com/Robotics-STAR-Lab/C2-Explorer | 多UAV,探索,去中心化 | 61 | 4 | - |
| 6 | SizingLab/FAST-UAV | 开源最优无人机设计框架，多学科方法 | https://github.com/SizingLab/FAST-UAV | 无人机设计,优化,多学科 | 31 | 13 | Jupyter Notebook |
| 6 | JJGU2291/MM-UAV-Benchmark | MM-UAV 数据集官方基线代码 | https://github.com/JJGU2291/MM-UAV-Benchmark | UAV,数据集,基准,MM-UAV | 28 | 2 | Python |
| 5 | qiongwu86/Joint-Optimization-of-Trajectory-Cotrol-RA-and-Task-Offloading-for-Multi-UAV-Assisted-IoV | 多 UAV 辅助 IoV 的轨迹、控制、资源分配与任务卸载联合优化 | https://github.com/qiongwu86/Joint-Optimization-of-Trajectory-Cotrol-RA-and-Task-Offloading-for-Multi-UAV-Assisted-IoV | 多UAV,IoV,轨迹优化,任务卸载 | 23 | 4 | Python |
| 5 | theodpzz/uav-localization | IGARSS'24，神经网络与边缘检测提升 UAV 定位 | https://github.com/theodpzz/uav-localization | UAV定位,神经网络,边缘检测,IGARSS | 20 | 1 | Python |
| 5 | wuyou3474/MambaNUT | IROS 2025，基于 Mamba 的夜间 UAV 跟踪与自适应课程学习 | https://github.com/wuyou3474/MambaNUT | UAV跟踪,夜间,Mamba,IROS | 16 | 2 | Python |
| 4 | iottrends/UAV-AI | UAV AI 相关项目 | https://github

sections.heading: 🔎 GitHub 指定日期检索
sections.summary: 本表数据来自 GitHub 官方 `search/repositories` 在**全站公开仓库**范围内按关键词与时间条件（`pushed:`）筛出的结果，**不是** Trending 周榜/日榜榜单。关键词组为「uav & (rl|llm)」，时间窗口 2026-03-12 ~ 2026-03-18。
